# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent api gateway security.
# Category: api_gateway_security

services:
  - name: service1
    url: https://service1.example.com
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      timeout: 2000
    connect_timeout: 1000
    read_timeout: 2000
    write_timeout: 2000

  - name: service2
    url: https://service2.example.com
    retries:
      attempts: 3
      timeout: 2000
    connect_timeout: 1000
    read_timeout: 2000
    write_timeout: 2000

routes:
  - name: route_service1
    service: service1
    paths:
      - /api/service1
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST
    strip_path: true

  - name: route_service2
    service: service2
    paths:
      - /api/service2
    methods:
      - GET
      - POST
    strip_path: true

plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    service: service1
    config:
      second: 5
      hour: 1000

  - name: rate-limiting
    service: service2
    config:
      second: 5
      hour: 1000

  - name: key-auth
    service: service1
    config:
      key_in_body: false
      key_in_query: true

  - name: key-auth
    service: service2
    config:
      key_in_body: false
      key_in_query: true

  - name: cors
    service: service1
    config:
      origins: 
        - https://your-frontend.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
      headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization

  - name: cors
    service: service2
    config:
      origins: 
        - https://your-frontend.example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
      headers:
        - Content-Type
        - Authorization

  - name: hmac-auth
    service: service1
    config:
      secret: your_hmac_secret

  - name: hmac-auth
    service: service2
    config:
      secret: your_hmac_secret
